# Chris von Csefalvay

> AI researcher and computational epidemiologist. Principal, Clinical Intelligence and AI at HCLTech. Author of two technical books. Based in Denver, CO.

## Who He Is

Chris von Csefalvay is a Principal at HCLTech's AI practice, specialising in post-training for language models, agentic AI systems, and computational epidemiology. He has nearly two decades of experience in data science and AI across enterprise, life sciences, and public health.

He is the author of:
- *Post-Training: A Practical Guide for AI Engineers and Developers* (No Starch Press, 2026) — a comprehensive guide to SFT, RLHF, GRPO, DPO, evaluation discipline, LoRA/QLoRA, and domain adaptation for enterprise AI practitioners
- *Computational Modeling of Infectious Disease* (Elsevier, 2023) — a monograph on agent-based modelling, disease dynamics, and computational epidemiology

He holds degrees from the University of Oxford and Cardiff University. He is a Fellow of the Royal Society for Public Health and a Senior Member of IEEE. ORCID: 0000-0003-3131-0864.

## Areas of Expertise

- Post-training for language models: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR), GRPO, DPO, KTO, preference optimisation
- Agentic AI systems: multi-agent frameworks, verifiable agentic architectures, agent interaction protocols, agentic safety
- Large language models: evaluation, LLMOps, model routing, efficiency (LoRA, QLoRA, quantisation, distillation)
- Computational epidemiology: agent-based modelling, epidemic dynamics, geospatial epidemiology
- AI governance and ethics
- Pharmacovigilance and biomedical AI

## Key Writing (The Notebook)

- On post-training and reinforcement learning: /posts/post-training-instrument-cluster/, /posts/post-training-instrument-cluster-rl/, /posts/post-training-scale/
- On agentic AI and multi-agent systems: /posts/two-years-of-agents/, /posts/skeuomorphic-fallacy/, /posts/context-engineering/, /posts/programmatic-agentic-ai/
- On AI predictions and landscape: /posts/five-wild-guesses-2026/, /posts/five-wild-guesses/
- On AI philosophy and governance: /posts/war-for-the-soul-of-ai/, /posts/tlon/

- *Post-Training: A Practical Guide for AI Engineers and Developers*: https://posttraining.guide
- *Computational Modeling of Infectious Disease*: https://computationalinfectiousdisease.com
